name: Yes Mr. President
short_description: Are you ready to test your leadership skills in Yes, Mr. President? Every decision you make will shape your nation's future. Answer wisely to improve your people's lives—but beware, wrong choices can lead to crisis!
detailed_description:
Are you ready to discover your leadership skills with Yes, Mr. President?
In this game, where you'll showcase your strategy, knowledge, and management abilities, every decision you make will shape the future of your country!

Answer the questions correctly to steer your nation toward a brighter future.
Remember, every correct answer improves your people's quality of life, while wrong choices can lead to economic and social challenges!

Realistic Country Management
From the economy to education, healthcare to social policies—every decision you make impacts the well-being of your people.

Unexpected Challenges
Lead your country not only through the questions you face but also through the battles you fight in mini-games.

Tough Choices
Every question and decision shapes the future of your nation. Learn to think strategically to succeed!

Dynamic Gameplay Experience
Here’s a little spoiler: think carefully before leaving your country behind—you might not find it the same when you return.
